appliedCoupons.description: A container that returns the information for the coupons that were applied in the guest checkout session.

checkoutSessionId.description: The eBay-assigned guest checkout session ID. This ID is created after a successful initiateGuestCheckoutSession call.

lineItems.description: An array of line items associated with the guest checkout session.

pricingSummary.description: A container that breaks down the costs for the order, including total cost, shipping cost, tax, fees, and any discounts.

shippingAddress.description: A container that returns the address to which the purchase order will be shipped.

warnings.description: An array of errors or warnings that were generated during the method processing.
